name: Carnival Of Souls
short_description: Embark on Carnival of Souls, a first-person, rogue lite, shooter where strategic weapon choices and upgrades are key to surviving intense battles across strange dimensions.
detailed_description: Step right up to Carnival of Souls, a heart-pounding first-person, rogue lite, shooter set in a twisted carnival world filled with strange dimensions. Navigate vibrant landscapes connected by mysterious portals and face relentless waves of enemies. With an arsenal of powerful weapons and upgrades at your disposal, your success depends on quick thinking and skill. How long can you survive the Carnival of Souls?
about_the_game: Step right up to Carnival of Souls, a heart-pounding first-person, rogue lite, shooter set in a twisted carnival world filled with strange dimensions.
